targets.expr: sum by (frameworks_service, method, endpoint, status) (rate({__name__=~".*_http_requests_total", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, frameworks_service, method, endpoint) (rate({__name__=~".*_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])))
sum by (frameworks_service, method, status) (rate({__name__=~".*_grpc_requests_total", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval]))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, frameworks_service, method) (rate({__name__=~".*_grpc_request_duration_seconds_bucket", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by (frameworks_service, method) (rate({__name__=~".*_grpc_requests_total", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node", status!="ok"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (frameworks_service, method) (rate({__name__=~".*_grpc_requests_total", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)
sum by (frameworks_service, topic, operation, status) (rate({__name__=~".*_kafka_messages_total", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval]))
max by (frameworks_service, topic, partition) ({__name__=~".*_kafka_consumer_lag", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"})

sum by (frameworks_service) (rate({__name__=~".*_db_wait_duration_seconds_total", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (frameworks_service) (rate({__name__=~".*_db_wait_count_total", frameworks_service=~"$service", node_id=~"$node"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

panels.title: Livepeer gateway auth-webhook rejections by reason
Service-discovery resolutions that ended without a usable target

targets.expr: sum by (stream, protocol, host) (stream_packets_lost) / clamp_min(sum by (stream, protocol, host) (stream_packets_total), 1)

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS boots FROM player_boot_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT ifNull(countIf(outcome != 'success') / nullIf(count(), 0), 0) AS not_success_rate FROM player_boot_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT countIf(positionCaseInsensitive(cdn_cache_status, 'hit') > 0) / nullIf(countIf(cdn_cache_status != ''), 0) AS cache_hit_ratio FROM player_boot_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, quantileIf(0.5)(total_ttf_ms, total_ttf_ms > 0) AS p50, quantileIf(0.95)(total_ttf_ms, total_ttf_ms > 0) AS p95, quantileIf(0.99)(total_ttf_ms, total_ttf_ms > 0) AS p99 FROM player_boot_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, avgIf(gateway_resolve_ms, gateway_resolve_ms > 0) AS gateway_resolve, avgIf(mist_hydrate_ms, mist_hydrate_ms > 0) AS mist_hydrate, avgIf(player_select_ms, player_select_ms > 0) AS player_select, avgIf(connect_ms, connect_ms > 0) AS connect, avgIf(prebuffer_ms, prebuffer_ms > 0) AS prebuffer FROM player_boot_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT serving_cluster_id, node_id, protocol, count() AS boots, countIf(outcome = 'error') AS errors, quantileIf(0.95)(total_ttf_ms, total_ttf_ms > 0) AS p95_ttf_ms, countIf(positionCaseInsensitive(cdn_cache_status, 'hit') > 0) / nullIf(countIf(cdn_cache_status != ''), 0) AS cache_hit_ratio FROM player_boot_samples WHERE cluster_attributed = 1 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY serving_cluster_id, node_id, protocol ORDER BY boots DESC LIMIT 100

options.content:
# Storage & Asset Serving
Freeze (S3 upload), defrost (cold read-through), relay serving, DTSH generation, eviction, and sync-outcome reliability. Per-tenant/per-asset detail lives in Metabase (ClickHouse storage_events); this is cluster-wide ops.

# Trigger durability
Durable forwarding of final/accounting Mist triggers (USER_END, STREAM_END, PUSH_END, RECORDING_END, RECORDING_SEGMENT, LIVEPEER_SEGMENT_COMPLETE, PROCESS_AV_VIRTUAL_SEGMENT_COMPLETE).

See `docs/architecture/trigger-durability.md`. Helmsman writes each trigger to a local WAL before responding 200 OK to Mist; the forwarder retries until Foghorn returns a positive `MistTriggerAck`, which Foghorn only sends after Decklog's typed and raw Kafka publishes commit.
